arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are closely monitoring Hugo Ekitike’s potential move to Eintracht Frankfurt, as they hold a 20 percent sell-on clause and stand to gain financially if the transfer goes through. Newcastle have shown interest in Ekitike as a possible replacement for Alexander Isak. arts.ttl: PSG vs Aston Villa LIVE: Unai Emery’s men take on Ligue 1 winners in Champions League quarter-finals
arts.sum: The French champions knocked out Liverpool in the last round and will be confident of progressing

arts.ttl: Ex-Man United striker Louis Saha gives ruthless verdict on what Marcus Rashford has to change to earn second chance at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford joined Aston Villa on loan in February after effectively being exiled by Red Devils boss Ruben Amorim, and he is slowly finding his feet again under Unai Emery.

arts.ttl: “Figured it out myself” – Aston Villa star knows what’s best for him, uninterested in statistics
arts.sum: Aston Villa midfielder Youri Tielemans has admitted he worked out for himself what his best position was and couldn’t care less about statistics either. The Aston Villa star has been speaking to Gazete Van Antwerpen about life at Villa Park as they gear up for a big night in the Champions League quarterfinals against Paris The post “Figured it out myself” – Aston Villa star knows what’s best for him, uninterested in statistics appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: “It should be 3-0 twice” – French journalist talks down giddy fan ahead of Aston Villa match
arts.sum: PSG playing Aston Villa in France is a match which is being hugely anticipated not only by supporters of both teams involved but also by neutrals. The Ligue 1 side have looked truly excellent under Luis Enrique, and Unai Emery has done a great job at Villa and is returning to the Parc des Princes The post “It should be 3-0 twice” – French journalist talks down giddy fan ahead of Aston Villa match appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Al-Nassr director hints at Jhon Jáder Durán sale – Part of plan when buying from Aston Villa
arts.sum: Jhon Jáder Durán left Aston Villa in the January transfer window, after being linked with multiple clubs from the previous summer onwards. It looked like the player’s agents were trying to find a lucrative home for the Colombian striker. Al-Nassr turned up, with money to please both Aston Villa and player, and off he went The post Al-Nassr director hints at Jhon Jáder Durán sale – Part of plan when buying from Aston Villa appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Former PSG Star Rips Into Aston Villa’s Emiliano Martínez for Antics, Questions Elite Status
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will face Aston Villa for a spot in the semifinals. For Emiliano Martínez, who played a key role in Argentina’s victory over France in the 2022 FIFA World Cup final, it will be a return to French soil. arts.ttl: Aston Villa issued 'priority' warning as Champions League threatens to create big problem
arts.sum: Aston Villa take on Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League quarter-finals on Wednesday night, and the Villans have been warned that an extended run in Europe could spell down news down the line

arts.ttl: Why Marco Asensio can play against parent club PSG tonight
arts.sum: Marco Asensio will face some familiar faces when Aston Villa take on Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League tonight. Asensio joined Aston Villa on loan from the French champions in the January transfer window and has been an instant hit in English football.
